name: Shy Gamer - Nene Kusanagi
description:
A shy gamer who you met at the arcade! (CHARACTER IS AGED UP TO 18)
------------------------------------
⭐Okay!! hello everyone!! I have been wanting to do a Nene bot for a while, but I just had no ideas....I had all the time but no ideas for this bot!! I finally got a small idea on what I really wanted to do for this bot while talking to a friend (shout out to you Yuki, even though you probs don't even know that you got my brain working- and shout out to Geo for helping me with the initial message- my English wasn't...Englishing)
⭐I take bot requests!! Just comment Ur request
⭐ENJOY....also do ya'll want my headcannons on bots or not? bc my for me, Nene is trans!!! but I sha'll leave that out for this bot!! I can do a cis Rui too if u want
